item.title: Hondurans vote to elect new president in close race under shadow of Trump’s surprise intervention
item.author: Associated Press
item.content:encoded:
In addition to a new president, voters will elect a new Congress, as well as hundreds of local positions. (AP video by Elmer Martínez)
Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress Read more: https://apnews.com​
This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home

item.title: Pope Leo XIV in Lebanon: What political message can we expect him to deliver?
item.author: DW News
item.content:encoded:
In Lebanon, Pope Leo has now begun the second leg of first overseas visit as pontiff.
The pope is expected to appeal for peace in the region as the focus of his visit. Lebanon is still being hit by Israeli airstrikes, despite a ceasefire. Lebanon is a Muslim-majority country, but around a third of the population are Christians. Crowds gathered to welcome the Pope hours before his plane touched down.
00:00 Pope Leo XIV arrives in Beirut 00:39 Stella Männer, DW Correspondent
For more news go to: http://www.dw.com/en/
Follow DW on social media: ►Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/dwnews ►TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@dwnews ►Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/deutschewellenews/ ►Twitter: https://twitter.com/dwnews
Für Videos in deutscher Sprache besuchen Sie: https://www.youtube.com/dwdeutsch
Subscribe: https://www.youtube.com/user/deutschewelleenglish?sub_confirmation=1
#pope #lebanon #peace

item.title: Philippines: Thousands protest corruption in flood projects | DW News
item.author: DW News
item.content:encoded:
Thousands protested in the Philippines against what they call systemic corruption in the country. They demanded the government to take strong action against officials involved in a multi-billion-dollar infrastructure scandal.
For more news go to: http://www.dw.com/en/
Follow DW on social media: ►Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/dwnews ►TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@dwnews ►Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/deutschewellenews/ ►Twitter: https://twitter.com/dwnews
Für Videos in deutscher Sprache besuchen Sie: https://www.youtube.com/dwdeutsch
Subscribe: https://www.youtube.com/user/deutschewelleenglish?sub_confirmation=1
#philippines #floods #corruption

item.title: Worshippers in Istanbul react after Pope Leo takes part in ceremony with Patriarch Bartholomew
item.author: Associated Press
item.content:encoded:
Worshippers have hailed Pope Leo XIV's visit to Turkey after he held a divine liturgy with Ecumenical Patriarch Bartholomew in Istanbul on Sunday in a gesture of support for Christian unity.
Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress Read more: https://apnews.com​
This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home

item.title: Pope Leo XIV arrives in Lebanon in a bid to bring hope to a war-wracked region
item.author: Associated Press
item.content:encoded:
Pope Leo XIV Sunday arrived in Beirut as he continues first foreign trip to bring a message of peace the region at a time of war and escalating tensions.
Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress Read more: https://apnews.com​
This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home

item.title: Venezuela, Russia's ‘shadow fleet’ and AI shopping
item.author: Reuters
item.content:encoded:
U.S. President Donald Trump says Venezuelan airspace should be considered closed as tensions mount with Nicolas Maduros’ government. Ukraine says naval drones hit two tankers from Russia’s ‘shadow fleet’. Hondurans vote in a divisive election. Plus, we look at how retailers are trying to get on your AI holiday shopping list.
Listen to On Assignment - Tracking Trump’s retribution targets (https://www.reuters.com/podcasts/tracking-trumps-retribution-targets-2025-11-29/)
Listen to Morning Bid podcast here (https://www.reuters.com/podcasts/reuters-morning-bid/morning-bid-4-trillion-club-2025-11-25/?referrer=singular_click_id%3D626fcc09-fb06-456f-be12-1ab99226fb6e) .
Sign up for the Reuters Econ World newsletter here (https://www.reuters.com/newsletters/reuters-econ-world/) .
Listen to the Reuters Econ World podcast here (https://nam02.safelinks.protection.outlook.com/?url=https%3A%2F%2Flink.chtbl.com%2FAbxd8GDx&data=05%7C02%7CGayle.Issa%40thomsonreuters.com%7Cdeedd17f603f4b360c6d08dd887d4c6f%7C62ccb8646a1a4b5d8e1c397dec1a8258%7C0%7C0%7C638816793925850907%7CUnknown%7CTWFpbGZsb3d8eyJFbXB0eU1hcGkiOnRydWUsIlYiOiIwLjAuMDAwMCIsIlAiOiJXaW4zMiIsIkFOIjoiTWFpbCIsIldUIjoyfQ%3D%3D%7C0%7C%7C%7C&sdata=sRtg8imh3eiK%2FLk7ACPuErZrMr20TgVVBxPiM1Vhy4E%3D&reserved=0) .
Visit the Thomson Reuters Privacy Statement (https://www.thomsonreuters.com/en/privacy-statement.html) for information on our privacy and data protection practices.
You may also visit megaphone.fm/adchoices (https://nam02.safelinks.protection.outlook.com/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fmegaphone.spotify.com%2Fabout-advertisements&data=05%7C02%7CGayle.Issa%40thomsonreuters.com%7Cdeedd17f603f4b360c6d08dd887d4c6f%7C62ccb8646a1a4b5d8e1c397dec1a8258%7C0%7C0%7C638816793925865321%7CUnknown%7CTWFpbGZsb3d8eyJFbXB0eU1hcGkiOnRydWUsIlYiOiIwLjAuMDAwMCIsIlAiOiJXaW4zMiIsIkFOIjoiTWFpbCIsIldUIjoyfQ%3D%3D%7C0%7C%7C%7C&sdata=wKzcMqK1Jgd8UvIvqngaWQBitV9DjLnzqGz8cs1suDw%3D&reserved=0) to opt out of targeted advertising.
Learn more about your ad choices. Visit megaphone.fm/adchoices (https://megaphone.fm/adchoices)

item.title: Bodies carried away after deadly Hong Kong fire claims 128 lives and sparks safety crackdown
item.author: Associated Press
item.content:encoded:
With dozens of people still unaccounted for, rescue teams in Hong Kong continued to search the ruins of eight buildings that went up in flames last week, killing at least 128 people in one of the city's deadliest blazes. (AP video by Ayaka McGill)
Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress Read more: https://apnews.com​
This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home

item.title: Hong Kong's Filipinos, Indonesians pray for fire victims | REUTERS
item.author: Reuters
item.content:encoded:
Members of Hong Kong's Filipino and Indonesian communities mourned for the victims of a deadly blaze in a high-rise apartment complex in the city which has claimed 146 lives so far.
#News #Reuters #Newsfeed #hongkong #china #fire #investigations
Read the story here: https://reut.rs/4ottioN
👉 Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/reuterssubscribe
Keep up with the latest news from around the world: https://www.reuters.com/ Follow Reuters on Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/Reuters Follow Reuters on Twitter: https://twitter.com/Reuters Follow Reuters on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/reuters/?hl=en

item.title: Pope Leo XIV wraps up Turkey visit | DW News
item.author: DW News
item.content:encoded:
Pope Leo is concluding his trip to Turkey, where he's offered another olive branch across a sectarian - and for his hosts, political frontier. After earlier meetings with Muslim clerics and the patriarch of Orthodox Christianity, the American-born pontiff visited the Armenian Apostolic Cathedral in Istanbul. With some 50,000 members, it's the largest Christian community in Turkey. But it's also a source of political friction. Many countries including Germany call the World War One-era mass killings of Armenians by Ottoman Turks a 'genocide.'
00:00 Pope Leo XIV wraps up Turkey visit 01:22 Dorian Jones, DW Correspondent
For more news go to: http://www.dw.com/en/
Follow DW on social media: ►Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/dwnews ►TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@dwnews ►Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/deutschewellenews/ ►Twitter: https://twitter.com/dwnews
Für Videos in deutscher Sprache besuchen Sie: https://www.youtube.com/dwdeutsch
Subscribe: https://www.youtube.com/user/deutschewelleenglish?sub_confirmation=1
#pope #turkey #istanbul

item.title: North Korea leader Kim Jong Un and daughter mark air force anniversary
item.author: Associated Press
item.content:encoded:
North Korea staged a big show for its air force Saturday, with leader Kim Jong Un and his daughter taking part.
Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress Read more: https://apnews.com​
This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home

item.title: 'Molly' the turtle released back to sea after recovery
item.author: Reuters
item.content:encoded:
🐢 A loggerhead sea turtle that became an internet sensation while undergoing life-saving treatment in the Florida Keys was released back into the ocean, drawing hundreds of spectators to a Key West beach.
#turtle #keywest #ocean #florida #recovery
👉 Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/reuterssubscribe

item.author: Associated Press
item.content:encoded:
Netanyahu comments on request for pardon during his ongoing corruption trial
Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress Read more: https://apnews.com​

item.title: New AfD youth organization sparks major protest in Germany | DW News
item.author: DW News
item.content:encoded:
Tens of thousands of people in Germany are protesting against the far-right AfD launching its new youth wing. Police, water cannon, blocked highways — and a controversial new leader who wants to train the next generation of Germany’s far-right politicians.
For more news go to: http://www.dw.com/en/

item.title: Emergency teams respond after Russian strike on Vyshgorod, Kyiv region
item.author: Associated Press
item.content:encoded:
Local authorities reported one person killed and 11 injured following a Russian strike on Kyiv's northern satellite of Vyshgorod. 146 people have been evacuated from a high-rise building with rescue efforts continuing through the night.
Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress Read more: https://apnews.com​
This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home

item.title: Behind the scenes as AP covers Pope Leo XIV's visit to small Armenian church in Istanbul
item.author: Associated Press
item.content:encoded:
On the last day of his visit to Turkey, Pope Leo XIV stopped by the small Armenian church in Istanbul to greet the faithful, a look behind-the-scenes with AP’s Vatican Correspondent Associated Press. (AP video by Trisha Thomas)
Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress Read more: https://apnews.com​
This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home

item.title: Behind the scenes as Pope Leo XIV visits Istanbul's Blue Mosque in Turkey
item.author: Associated Press
item.content:encoded:
Pope Leo XIV started the second day of his trip to Turkey with a visit to Istanbul’s Blue Mosque on Saturday. Leo was following in the footsteps of his recent predecessors, who all made high-profile visits to the mosque in a gesture of respect to Turkey’s Muslim majority.
#popeleoxiv #pope #turkey #news
Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress Read more: https://apnews.com​
This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home

item.title: Lebanon finalizes preparations ahead of Pope Leo XIV’s visit on historic first foreign trip
item.author: Associated Press
item.content:encoded:
Pope Leo XIV is expected to arrive in Beirut on Sunday continuing his first foreign trip to Turkey and Lebanon.
Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress Read more: https://apnews.com​
This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home

item.title: Pope Leo XIV prays at Armenian cathedral in Istanbul
item.author: Associated Press
item.content:encoded:
Pope Leo XIV prayed at the Armenian Apostolic Cathedral in Istanbul on Sunday in a gesture of support for Christian unity and Christian minorities in Turkey.
Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress Read more: https://apnews.com​
This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home

item.title: Law enforcement on scene after shooting in Stockton leaves 4 dead, 10 wounded
item.author: Associated Press
item.content:encoded:
Four people were killed and 10 wounded in a shooting during a family gathering at a banquet hall in Stockton, sheriff’s officials said Saturday. The victims included both children and adults, said Heather Brent, a spokesperson for the San Joaquin County sheriff’s office. Early indications “suggest this may have been a targeted incident,” Brent said during a news conference at the scene.
#california #news
Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress Read more: https://apnews.com​
This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home

item.title: LIVE: Pope Leo XIV prays with Ecumenical Patriarch in Istanbul
item.author: Associated Press
item.content:encoded:
Watch live as Pope Leo XIV participates in a divine liturgy with Ecumenical Patriarch Bartholomew I, the spiritual leader of the world's Orthodox Christians, in Istanbul, Turkey.
#popeleoxiv #pope #live

item.title: LIVE: Memorial at scene of Hong Kong’s deadliest fire in decades
item.author: Associated Press
item.content:encoded:
Live view from Wang Fuk Court complex in Hong Kong's northern suburbs where a fire killed at least 146 people, with flames covering seven of the eight towers. Read more: https://bit.ly/4pCzEmT
#hongkong #live

item.title: Thousands in Philippines protest corruption and demand return of stolen funds
item.author: Associated Press
item.content:encoded:
Thousands of demonstrators in the Philippines including from the dominant Roman Catholic church clergy protested Sunday, calling for the swift prosecution of top legislators and officials implicated in a corruption scandal that has buffeted the Asian democracy. (AP video by Joeal Calupitan)
Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress Read more: https://apnews.com​
This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home

item.title: Philippines: Thousands protest corruption scandal | DW News
item.author: DW News
item.content:encoded:
Protesters are calling out officials for substandard, defective, or non-existent flood control projects in the Philippines.
For more news go to: http://www.dw.com/en/

item.title: Africa's Investment Landscape: Highlights From the Bloomberg Africa Business Summit
item.author: Bloomberg Television
item.content:encoded:
At the Bloomberg Africa Business Summit, influential leaders, investors, and innovators gathered to discuss the forces reshaping the continent’s economic future. From policy shifts and technology breakthroughs to sustainability, finance and trade partnerships, Jennifer Zabasajja brings you key insights and exclusive conversations with the people driving Africa’s next era of growth, including African Rainbow Minerals' Patrice Motsepe, Rand Merchant Bank's Emrie Brown, Egypt's Hassan El Khatib, Standard Chartered's Benjamin Hung and South Africa's Ronald Lamola. -------- More on Bloomberg Television and Markets
Like this video? Subscribe and turn on notifications so you don't miss any videos from Bloomberg Markets & Finance: https://tinyurl.com/ysu5b8a9 Visit http://www.bloomberg.com for business news & analysis, up-to-the-minute market data, features, profiles and more.
Connect with Bloomberg Television on: X: https://twitter.com/BloombergTV Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/BloombergTelevision Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/bloombergtv/
Connect with Bloomberg Business on: X: https://twitter.com/business Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/bloombergbusiness Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/bloombergbusiness/ TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@bloombergbusiness?lang=en Reddit: https://www.reddit.com/r/bloomberg/ LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/bloomberg-news/
More from Bloomberg: Bloomberg Radio: https://twitter.com/BloombergRadio
Bloomberg Surveillance: https://twitter.com/bsurveillance Bloomberg Politics: https://twitter.com/bpolitics Bloomberg Originals: https://twitter.com/bbgoriginals
Watch more on YouTube: Bloomberg Technology: https://www.youtube.com/@BloombergTechnology Bloomberg Originals: https://www.youtube.com/@business Bloomberg Quicktake: https://www.youtube.com/@BloombergQuicktake Bloomberg Espanol: https://www.youtube.com/@bloomberg_espanol Bloomberg Podcasts: https://www.youtube.com/@BloombergPodcasts

item.title: America clamps down on asylum; Trump says Venezuela’s airspace closed, and more
Trump's call to close Venezuelan airspace stirs confusion in Caracas | REUTERS
item.author: Reuters
item.content:encoded:
Trump's airspace closure announcement stirred anxiety in Venezuela, with residents expressing concerns over travel disruptions. #News #Reuters #Newsfeed #trump #airspaceclosure #venezuela
Read the story here: https://reut.rs/4arYph8
👉 Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/reuterssubscribe
Keep up with the latest news from around the world: https://www.reuters.com/ Follow Reuters on Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/Reuters Follow Reuters on Twitter: https://twitter.com/Reuters Follow Reuters on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/reuters/?hl=en

item.title: Pope Leo XIV visits Blue Mosque in attempt to promote interfaith dialogue | DW News
item.author: DW News
item.content:encoded:
Pope Leo has joined other religious leaders in Turkey with a message of reconciliation on his first trip abroad as pontiff. The pope took part in a service with Patiarch Bartholomew, the head of the Orthodox Church. The two signed a joint declaration to heal a nearly 1,000-year rift between their churches. The pontiff also joined Muslim leaders on a tour of Istanbul's Blue Mosque. And Pope Leo later held a mass attended by tens of thousands in an arena in Istanbul.
Chapters: 0:00 Pope Leo tours Blue Mosque 0:33 Meghan J. Clark, St. John's University 4:54 Dorian Jones, DW Correspondent 8:27 Julia Hahn, DW Turkey Correspondent
For more news go to: http://www.dw.com/en/
Follow DW on social media: ►Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/dwnews ►TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@dwnews ►Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/deutschewellenews/ ►Twitter: https://twitter.com/dwnews
Für Videos in deutscher Sprache besuchen Sie: https://www.youtube.com/dwdeutsch
Subscribe: https://www.youtube.com/user/deutschewelleenglish?sub_confirmation=1 #pope #turkey #leo

item.title: Floods and landslides hit Indonesia | DW News
item.author: DW News
item.content:encoded:
Large parts of Indonesia, Malaysia and Thailand have been stricken by cyclone-fuelled torrential rain for a week, with a rare tropical storm forming in the Malacca Strait. (Reuters) The catastrophe is one of the deadliest natural disasters to hit Indonesia this year, underscoring the country's escalating vulnerability to climate-driven weather extremes.
For more news go to: http://www.dw.com/en/

item.title: Ukraine hits two Russian 'shadow fleet' tankers in Black Sea | REUTERS
item.author: Reuters
item.content:encoded:
Ukrainian naval drones hit two sanctioned tankers in the Black Sea as they headed to a Russian port to load up with oil destined for foreign markets. #News #Reuters #Newsfeed #ukrainerussiawar #blacksea

item.author: Reuters
item.content:encoded:
Rescuers search for hundreds missing in Sumatra after floods and landslides kill over 300, with northern regions hardest hit and infrastructure severely damaged. #News #Reuters #Newsfeed #floods #indonesia #srilanka

item.author: Reuters
item.content:encoded:
Hong Kong mourns 128 deaths from the Wang Fuk Court fire, the city's deadliest in nearly 80 years, with 150 still missing and authorities investigating unsafe materials #News #Reuters #Newsfeed #hongkong #hongkongfire #missing

item.title: Hong Kong fire: bamboo scaffolding really to blame? | DW News
item.author: DW News
item.content:encoded:
In Hong Kong, dozens of people are now known to have died in a major tower block fire. Many more are reported missing after the blaze ripped through a high-rise residential complex. Many reports point to traditional bamboo scaffolding as a potential cause, while residents want to focus on a different issue. #unpacked #dwnewsshorts
For more news go to: http://www.dw.com/en/

item.title: What Venezuelans think of Trump's attempt to close Venezuelan airspace | DW News
item.author: DW News
item.content:encoded:
Donald Trump says the airspace above Venezuela is to be closed. The US president is stepping up his feud with Venezuela's leftist leader Nicolas Maduro over alleged drug-running through the Caribbean. With a US task force already in the region, Trump has previously said land operations will begin soon against suspected Venezuelan drug-traffickers.
Chapters: 0:00 Trump says Venezuelan airspace to be closed 2:26 Alvaro Algarra, Journalist
For more news go to: http://www.dw.com/en/

item.title: Ukrainian drone pilots look to AI for battlefield edge | REUTERS
item.author: Reuters
item.content:encoded:
As Russia and Ukraine lean on the use of drones in their war, Ukrainian forces say many of their operations are now impossible without the help of an AI-assisted targeting system.
#News #Reuters #Newsfeed #ukrainewar #ukraine #russia #ai #drone #military
Read the story here: https://reut.rs/3Kw0v59

item.title: One year of protests in Georgia since halted EU talks | DW News
item.author: DW News
item.content:encoded:
Thousands gathered in Georgia's capital to mark 365 days of non-stop protests against their government's decision to stop talks on joining the European Union.
For more news go to: http://www.dw.com/en/

item.title: Document that launched Apple heads to auction
item.author: Reuters
item.content:encoded:
An emblem of American ingenuity is headed to auction in New York: the foundational agreement that launched what would become one of the world's most valuable companies. The original Apple founding papers could fetch up to $4 million.
#apple #auction #tech #stevejobs
👉 Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/reuterssubscribe
Keep up with the latest news from around the world: https://www.reuters.com/ Follow Reuters on Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/Reuters Follow Reuters on Twitter: https://twitter.com/Reuters Follow Reuters on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/reuters/?hl=en

item.title: Thousands protest in Germany against AfD youth wing's founding meeting | DW News
item.author: DW News
item.content:encoded:
Here in Germany, thousands of demonstrators have gathered in the western city of Giessen to protest against the founding meeting of the far-right Alternative for Germany's new youth wing. 6-thousand police are standing by. Generation Deutschland, as the new group is expected to be called, replaces the AfD's previous association, which was confirmed by the courts as right wing extremist. The changes aim to allow the AfD to exert more control over it's youth movement.
For more news go to: http://www.dw.com/en/

Für Videos in deutscher Sprache besuchen Sie: https://www.youtube.com/dwdeutsch
Subscribe: https://www.youtube.com/user/deutschewelleenglish?sub_confirmation=1 #afd #germany #farright
